demoFeedback.dialog.description:
What you just saw is ~80% of a real system.
Let’s talk about how to turn this into a production-ready solution in weeks, not months.
demoFeedback.dialog.successBody: We’ll get back to you shortly.
demoFeedback.dialog.title: Talk to Open Mercato team
